_protocol: Workers may ONLY flip 'passes' to true and fill 'evidence' with a real proof-artifact path or URL. Never edit id/title/acceptance. Orchestrator adds features at milestone planning.

features.title: Repo scaffold with AI-handoff state files
features.acceptance: PROJECT.md, features.json, progress.md, init.sh, docs/spec.md, docs/architecture.md, checkpoints/ exist at repo root and describe the project accurately

features.title: Sealed sim core with deterministic RNG streams
features.acceptance: sim/ contains pure-Lua Sim with new/apply/state/snapshot/restore/state_hash; no engine APIs, os, io, or math.random anywhere under sim/ (grep clean)

features.title: Headless sim test suite passes
features.acceptance: lua5.4 tests/run_tests.lua exits 0 with >=10 passing tests covering determinism, stream independence, snapshot round-trip, intent-resolution fairness, and invalid-command safety

features.title: CI test gate green on GitHub Actions
features.acceptance: Workflow run on main: 'test' job passes on ubuntu-latest

features.title: CI produces installable debug APK
features.acceptance: Workflow run on main: 'build-android' job bundles arm64+armv7 debug APK via pinned bob.jar and uploads it as an artifact

features.title: StS-style layered node map generation
features.acceptance: sim/map.lua generates a connected layered map from the map stream; property tests: all paths reach boss, node counts within spec, same seed => same map

features.title: Dice-builder combat v1 (10 dice variants, 3 enemies, 1 boss)
features.acceptance: Content defined as data modules under data/; headless autoplayer completes 100 seeded runs without error; win rate within 20-80% band

features.title: Full seeded run playable on device
features.acceptance: Debug APK: map -> fights -> boss -> run summary with placeholder art; manual play-through video or device log as evidence

features.title: Autosave every action + resume
features.acceptance: Kill the app mid-fight, relaunch: game resumes into the exact pending decision; snapshot round-trip test in engine
